title: pilosella glaucescens subsp. pseudauriculoides
intro: Pilosella glaucescens subsp. pseudauriculoides is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to certain regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and inhibit the growth of bacteria. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Pilosella glaucescens subsp. pseudauriculoides can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to harness its health benefits and support overall well-being.
